text:
label = (cit.get("label") or "").lower()
                            fname_base = fname.rsplit(".", 1)[0] if "." in fname else fname
                            label_base = label.rsplit(".", 1)[0] if "." in label else label
                            if (fname_base and fname_base in resp_lower) or (label_base and label_base in resp_lower):
                                filtered_cits.append(cit)
                        response_document_citations = filtered_cits

                    if 0 <= msg_index < len(target_message_list):
                        target_message_list[msg_index]["response"] = final_assistant_response
                        if web_sources_accum:
                            target_message_list[msg_index]["web_sources"] = web_sources_accum
                        if response_document_citations:
                            target_message_list[msg_index]["document_citations"] = [dict(row) for row in response_document_citations]
                    chat_history_to_use[node_key] = node_data_hist
                    save_chat_state(
                        user_id,
                        chat_id_to_save,
                        node_map_to_use,
                        chat_history_to_use,
                        node_key,
                        initial_name_to_use,
                        is_new_chat=is_new_chat_session_val,
                        replace_chat_history=True,
                    )
                    yield _sse_event("assistant_chunk", {"content": f"\n\n*[Response may be incomplete due to: {finish_reason}]*", "node_key": node_key, "msg_index": msg_index, "chat_id": chat_id_to_save})
                    final_event_data = {"node_key": node_key, "msg_index": msg_index, "chat_id": chat_id_to_save}
                    if web_sources_accum:
                        final_event_data["web_sources"] = web_sources_accum
                    if response_document_citations:
                        final_event_data["document_citations"] = [dict(row) for row in response_document_citations]
                    yield _sse_event("stream_end", final_event_data)
                    break

            except Exception as e:
                stream_error = f"Error during API call/processing (Iteration {loop_count}): {str(e)}"
                logger.error(f"[ChatMessageStream Gen] Error in iteration {loop_count}: {e}", exc_info=True)
                error_occurred = True
                yield _sse_event("error", {"message": stream_error, "msg_index": msg_index, "chat_id": chat_id_to_save})
                break

        if error_occurred:
            if 0 <= msg_index < len(target_message_list):
                target_message_list.pop(msg_index)
            if not is_new_chat_session_val:
                save_chat_state(
                    user_id,
                    chat_id_to_save,
                    node_map_to_use,
                    chat_history_to_use,
                    node_key,
                    initial_name_to_use,
                    is_new_chat=False,
                    replace_chat_history=True,
                )
        elif loop_count >= MAX_TOOL_CALL_LOOPS:
            logger.warning("[ChatMessageStream Gen] Exceeded max tool call loops.")
            yield _sse_event("assistant_chunk", {"content": "\n\n*[Maximum processing steps reached.]*", "node_key": node_key, "msg_index": msg_index, "chat_id": chat_id_to_save})
            if 0 <= msg_index < len(target_message_list):
                target_message_list[msg_index]["response"] = final_assistant_response + " [Max loops reached]"
                if web_sources_accum:
                    target_message_list[msg_index]["web_sources"] = web_sources_accum
                if response_document_citations:
                    target_message_list[msg_index]["document_citations"] = [dict(row) for row in response_document_citations]
            chat_history_to_use[node_key] = node_data_hist
            save_chat_state(
                user_id,
                chat_id_to_save,
                node_map_to_use,
                chat_history_to_use,
                node_key,
                initial_name_to_use,
                is_new_chat=is_new_chat_session_val,
                replace_chat_history=True,
            )
            final_event_data = {"node_key": node_key, "msg_index": msg_index, "chat_id": chat_id_to_save}
            if web_sources_accum:
                final_event_data["web_sources"] = web_sources_accum
            if response_document_citations:
                final_event_data["document_citations"] = [dict(row) for row in response_document_citations]
            yield _sse_event("stream_end", final_event_data)

        logger.info(f"--- [/chat_message v2 - Stream Gen] END (chat {chat_id_to_save}) ---")

    generator_function = generate_stream_response_with_tools(
        chat_id_to_save=current_chat_id,
        initial_name_to_use=initial_chat_name,
        node_map_to_use=node_map,
        chat_history_to_use=ch,
        is_new_chat_session_val=is_new_chat_session
    )

    response = Response(stream_with_context(generator_function), mimetype='text/event-stream')
    response.headers['Cache-Control'] = 'no-cache'
    response.headers['X-Accel-Buffering'] = 'no'
    return response


# ===================== /api/audio/transcribe =====================

@chat_message_bp.route("/api/audio/transcribe", methods=["POST"])
@login_required
def transcribe_audio():
    user_id = get_current_user_id()
    if False and not can_user_send_prompt(user_id):
        wait_mins = get_minutes_until_next_prompt(user_id)
        logger.warning(f"[AudioTranscribe] Usage limit. Wait {wait_mins} minutes.")

        plan = "unknown"
        if db and User:
            try:
                user = db.session.get(User, user_id)
                if user:
                    plan = user.plan or "unknown"
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error(f"[AudioTranscribe] Fetch user plan failed: {e}", exc_info=True)

        if plan == "trial":
            msg_text = "Trial limit reached. Upgrade plan."
        else:
            msg_text = f"You're sending a bit too many prompts too quickly. Please wait {wait_mins} minute{'s' if wait_mins != 1 else ''}."
